user.title: Mälarenergi PowerHub
user.description: Sign in with BankID. Click Next to show the QR code.

bankid_qr.title: Scan QR code with BankID
bankid_qr.description:
Sign in with Mobile BankID:
1. Open the BankID app on your phone
2. Click **Submit** to generate a fresh QR code
3. Scan the QR code immediately with BankID
4. After approving in BankID, click **Submit** again to complete sign-in

The QR rotates every second — click Submit right before scanning.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Mälarenergi. Check your internet connection.
error.bankid_failed: BankID login failed. Please try again.
error.no_facilities: No facilities found for this account.
